_comment: Copy to ~/.philont/mcp.json (or point PHILONT_MCP_CONFIG at this file). Each entry mounts an external MCP server whose tools automatically become agent-callable tools. 'browser' uses Microsoft's official Playwright (pure local stdio, free). capability=execute routes browser actions through onAuthRequest approval rather than auto-allowing them. You can also skip this file entirely and just set PHILONT_MCP_BROWSER=1 to enable the browser in one step.
